rows.label: qev075402_MSG0001
rows.name:
...My, my, an Earthling this time?
Recently, we've had customers visiting
this place one after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nice to meet you, my name is Moa. I am
a weapons merchant, conducting transactions
with travelers like yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what kind of weapons he handles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_SEL0021
rows.name: Interrogate Moa, suggesting he was the one who stole Gi Zang's weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0003
rows.name:
I handle all sorts of weapons, from
battle rifles to hyper missiles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hehe, and recently I
obtained a very rare katana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0005
rows.name:
It is of Lars make, but it boasts a
sharpness superior to any other blade.
It is a truly splendid masterpiece.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0006
rows.name:
...What's that? You came here
looking for this katana?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0007
rows.name:
I understand... It would be a shame for me to
part with such a masterpiece, but depending
on the conditions, I might yield it to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0008
rows.name:
The condition is... let's see.
I think I'll take your life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am but a powerless weapons merchant.
There is no way I could do something
so audacious, is there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0010
rows.name:
Rather than that, why don't we make a
deal? I want the weapons you possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0011
rows.name:
The condition is... let's see. In
exchange for your weapons, I will
kindly pump countless bullets into you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075402_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hehe, please confirm the power of the
weapons I handle with your own body.[ST:wait ]
